markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a content partnership between Groq and GrowthX AI.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Groq's Need:** Groq requires a partner to build a technical, SEO-driven content engine from scratch, as current content is limited to product launches and lacks SEO focus.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** GrowthX uses a "Strategy Sprint" to create detailed context artifacts (personas, voice guides) that enable its AI workflows to produce accurate technical content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Scope Mismatch:** Groq prioritizes fewer, high-quality "flagship" assets (e.g., comparisons, infographics) over GrowthX's standard high-volume model (5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Tyler will send technical content examples and schedule a demo to show how GrowthX can meet Groq's quality bar within a flexible scope.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Topics

### Groq's Content Gap & Growth Goals

  - [**Context:** Groq is scaling rapidly but lacks a formal growth strategy; Steph Smith was hired as Head of Growth 4–5 months ago to build one.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Current content is limited to product launches, with no SEO-driven educational or informational pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build an SEO engine across two properties:](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [`groq.com` (main site)](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [`console.groq.com/docs` (developer docs)](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Technical Requirement:** Content must be highly technical, often including code snippets, to serve a developer audience searching for specific models or acceleration methods.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### GrowthX's Technical Content Process

  - [**Method:** An end-to-end service combining AI workflows with "experts in the loop."](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Strategy Sprint (Phase 1):** Creates context artifacts to train the AI on Groq's business, ICP, and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Expert Integration:** Transcripts from meetings with client experts are embedded into workflows for synthetic, scalable accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Technical Examples:** Tyler cited work for Abnormal Security, Surge AI, and Augment Code to demonstrate capability.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Created guides on complex topics like "monorepo vs. polyrepo" and "multimodal RAG-driven codebases."](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Built a programmatic vendor directory with interactive charts and comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Webflow:** Developed technical integration guides with code snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)

### Scope & Pricing Mismatch

  - [**GrowthX's Standard Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** 3–4 week Strategy Sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** 12-month commitment for high-volume execution (target: 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Groq's Preferred Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Priority:** Fewer, higher-quality "flagship" assets (e.g., infographics, comparisons) over high-volume articles.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These assets are more valuable for sales enablement and have longer review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Tyler confirmed flexibility on scope for a strategic partner like Groq, suggesting a focus on quality over quantity.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [Send technical content examples from GrowthX's portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Send a calendar link to schedule a demo of GrowthX's workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [**Steph:**](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [Send links to existing Groq content that meets the desired quality bar (e.g., the "Groq LPU" article).](https://fathom.video/share/2XBuF1ttjExkDFG91MwxMqUzTsLyvZrR?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
